content.text:
{
  "success": false,
  "confidence": 0.95,
  "evidence_summary": "设备屏幕处于息屏/AOD状态(MIUI keyguard_root_view),仅显示暗色时钟16:3X,多次swipe up、click、press_back、open_app均无法唤醒或解锁屏幕,无法进入Markor应用。",
  "screenshot_paths": ["AOD lockscreen showing time 16:3X on MIUI device, no Markor or SMS app accessible"],
  "failure_reason": "设备处于锁屏(AOD)状态无法解锁,所有唤醒尝试(swipe、click、back、open_app)后wait_screen_update均返回screen_updated:false,且这是一台中国MIUI消费机,可能未安装AndroidWorld所需的Markor和Simple SMS Messenger应用。"
}
